title: Diddles message — Mercury approved, Rankett LLC official, partnership inclusions
html:
Diddles sends three things at once: (1) the partnership-inclusions list to put on the website ("you become our sales team while we focus on fulfillment, charge 3x+ what you pay us, do none of the work" — AI audit lead magnet, partner portal, 5-minute onboarding, automated reporting, offer + sales assets, pooled data, implementation support, KPIs, 24/7 support), (2) "got approved for Mercury just now, adding you to it today," (3) "Rankett LLC is official. Game time baby" — and a small copy edit: drop "watch how 100+ agencies use" → "watch how agencies use our fulfillment system." Same day as the Rankett meetup prep guide.

TL;DR

  • Rankett LLC formed Jan 7 2026 — corporate birthday, communicated by Diddles.
  • Mercury business banking approved same day; Diddles adding Yahir as authorized user.
  • Partnership-inclusions list crystallizes the ghost white label pitch: agencies become the sales arm, Rankett does fulfillment.

rankett · diddles · mercury bank · ghost white label · pooled data network effect · 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide
